hero.headline: CREATE DIGITAL
hero.body: Creativity that connects, strategies that convert

one.title: Aesthetic Vision
one.desc: Trained in cinema, visual culture, and editorial design. Every visual decision has intent: it doesn't just look good; it communicates, positions, and creates perception of value.

two.title: Strategy and Method
two.desc: 15 years of corporate analysis at a multinational. Behind every project, there is strategy, structure, and clear processes. Creativity with direction.

three.title: Full Execution
three.desc: Concept, design, and development in the same head. No intermediaries or communication noise. A coherent vision from the beginning down to the smallest detail.

s1.name: Social Media Management
s1.desc: Strategy, content, and visual direction for brands that need a digital presence with identity and consistency.

s2.name: UX/UI Design
s2.desc: Digital experiences designed based on navigation, clarity, and real user behavior.

s3.name: Meta Ads
s3.desc: Performance-oriented Facebook and Instagram campaigns, focusing on optimization and sustainable growth.

s4.name: Data Analysis
s4.desc: Strategic reading of metrics to detect opportunities, optimize campaigns, and make better decisions.

s5.name: Video Editing
s5.desc: Editing, motion graphics, and audiovisual pieces designed to capture attention and communicate with rhythm.

s6.name: Web Design
s6.desc: Visually solid, functional, and optimized sites on WordPress, Tienda Nube, and no-code platforms.

s7.name: SEO & Positioning
s7.desc: Content optimization and web structure to improve visibility, search, and organic positioning.

s8.name: E-commerce Management
s8.desc: Comprehensive management of online stores, shopping experience, and strategies to boost digital sales.

p1.title: Ley que Activa
p1.desc:
Comprehensive brand development and digital strategy for a law firm with a humanistic vision. The goal was to build a clear, professional, and accessible online presence.

Services developed:
• Digital communication strategy
• Visual identity and branding development
• SEO-oriented web design and architecture
• Creative direction and aesthetic guidelines
• Content optimization for organic positioning

Results:
Construction of a solid identity and organic growth of the digital presence.

p2.title: Desaburrite
p2.desc:
Product concept and design for an entertainment mobile app. The focus was on simplifying the user experience through an intuitive interface and clear architecture.

Services developed:
• Research and information architecture
• Wireframes and user flows design
• Interactive prototyping in Figma
• Interface design and scalable visual system
• User experience (UX) definition

Result:
Functional design ready for validation and future development stage.

p3.title: Paid Media Management
p3.desc:
Paid Media strategy for more than 60 apparel, services, and gastronomy brands. An approach that combines creativity, analysis, and constant optimization.

Services developed:
• Planning and management of Meta Ads campaigns
• Performance optimization and scalability
• Metrics and digital performance analysis
• Conversion-oriented creative development
• Segmentation strategies and continuous testing

Results:
ROAS of up to 8X in fashion e-commerce and up to 4X in services.

portfolio_cta.title: Want to see more?
portfolio_cta.desc: Explore my full portfolio on Behance with all my design work.

about.bio:
I am passionate about marketing and advertising. I have spent years working with both Argentine and international brands and agencies. 
I transform creative ideas into sales, connecting brands with people through strategic storytelling, designing optimized websites that facilitate the user's shopping experience, and scaling results with Google and Meta Ads campaigns.
Motivated by new challenges and continuous learning, I apply creativity and strategy to drive business growth.

podcast.title: MERLO'S PLACE
podcast.desc: Comprehensive development of a podcast focused on the culture of Greater Buenos Aires. Creative direction, general production, audiovisual editing, visual identity, content strategy, and digital broadcast management.
